news.t: Defiance Launches DRNL: 2X Leveraged ETF on Drones

holdings.infoBox: DRNL is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 300.75%, EHANG HLDGS SWAP CANT-L at 22.01%, ONDAS INC COM SWAP CANT-L at 21.75%, EVE HLDG INC SWAP CANT-L at 21.31%, and JOBY AVIATION INC SWAP CANT-L at 20.28%.

overview.description: The Defiance 2X Daily Long Pure Drone & Aerial Automation ETF (DRNL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x the daily performance of the BITA Pure Drone and Aerial Automation Index. The fund provides leveraged exposure to companies involved in drone technology and aerial automation. DRNL was launched on Mar 2, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.
infoTable: BITA Pure Drone and Aerial Automation Index

data.title: Defiance Launches DRNL: 2X Leveraged ETF on Drones
data.text: MIAMI, March 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs today announced the launch of the Defiance 2X Daily Long Pure Drone and Aerial Automation ETF (DRNL), expanding its lineup of leveraged thematic...
